title: lukefwalton.com: Durable Website Archive and Source Corpus
description: Public website archive and source corpus for lukefwalton.com. The archive contains original material by Luke F. Walton together with third-party media or excerpts used for documentation, commentary, provenance, or archival context. Copyright in third-party materials remains with their respective owners. It is a self-contained, dependency-free mirror generated automatically from the canonical site, with per-record verbatim Markdown and plain HTML plus a machine-readable catalog (catalog.json / catalog.jsonl). Original code, prose, metadata, and archive structure by Luke F. Walton are licensed CC BY-NC-ND 4.0; see RIGHTS.md.
